meta.title: AIcon — Same team. 10× the output.
meta.description: AI consulting for marketing, sales, ops and HR. We spot your problems before you do, then solve them with AI.

hero.title: Same team.
hero.subtitle: We spot your problems before you do — then solve them with AI. Faster, sharper, leaner.

crisis.title: 95% of AI projects never ship.
crisis.body: Companies pour billions into AI, yet most pilots stay in slide decks. The problem isn't the model — it's not knowing where and how to deploy it.

verticals.title: Four functions. Six products. All built, all shipped.

cases.name: BB
cases.tagline: Brief in. Interactive digital billboard out.
cases.problem: Building HTML5 digital billboards — Iran's highest-impact display ad format — used to take weeks of design and dev per campaign.
cases.approach: An engine that ingests a campaign brief and outputs a complete interactive HTML5 digital billboard, ready to ship.
cases.tool: BB engine — shipped to production in one month.

cases.name: Ad Builder
cases.problem: Design teams burned hours customizing creatives per client. At scale, the bottleneck collapsed everything else.
cases.approach: Pipeline that generates transparent images and videos with generative models, then auto-optimizes prompts based on what's working.
cases.tool: Ad Builder — generation + transparency + learning loop.

items.name: Sales
items.tagline: 30-hour deck, down to under an hour.

cases.name: AutoPro
cases.problem: Every custom B2B proposal cost a sales rep ~30 hours of PowerPoint work. Visual quality was inconsistent, sales cycle dragged.
cases.approach: Replaced PowerPoint with an interactive visual output. Brief in, fully personalized presentation out.

cases.name: Campaign Analyst
cases.tagline: Continuous campaign analysis with prioritized actions.
cases.problem: Manual campaign analysis was slow, partial, or skipped entirely. ROAS suffered for clients and for us.
cases.approach: A tool that reviews every active campaign hourly and daily, then ranks recommended actions by expected impact.

cases.name: Campaign Builder
cases.problem: Setting up campaigns across ad panels took ~2 hours per campaign manager — slow, error-prone, doesn't scale.
cases.approach: End-to-end automation for campaign setup across panels.

cases.name: Perf Pulse
cases.problem: Performance reviews used to be slow, subjective, paperwork-heavy. HR spent the cycle collecting data instead of coaching people.
cases.approach: Tool that combines project output, 360° peer feedback, and OKR data into a structured, bias-checked review per cycle.

reasoning.title: The model thinks. We ship.
reasoning.body: Every vertical gets one agent, one playbook, one KPI. No demos. No prompt shops.

outcome.title: Up to 10× faster. 10× sharper. On a leaner team.

steps.title: Audit
steps.body: We map your workflows, data, and gaps. We find problems before you do.

steps.title: Blueprint
steps.body: One solution per problem. ROI and timeline on paper — before we touch anything.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Implementation, with your team. Data plumbing, agents, integrations.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: Monthly retainer to maintain, iterate, scale — for as long as you need.

cta.title: Let's find where AI fits in your business.
cta.body: Free 30-minute audit. You walk out with an ROI estimate and an initial roadmap.
